name: Project Gangster Crips Riverside
description: The Rubidoux Project Crips (PJC) also known as the Project Gangster Crips (PJGC) and the West Side Rubidoux Project Crips or the P-Jays, are primarily, but not exclusively, an African-American multigenerational street gang located in the neighborhood of Rubidoux, on the West Side of Riverside, California.
